changes: Condensed skill from verbose original to focused reference with CSV and HTML sections
Added explicit CSV table formatting rules (preserve original headers, title case for secondary tables)
Added example Low Stock Alert table with Price column in skill body and description
Made description more action-oriented to encourage skill loading
notes: qwen3.5-397b consistently scores 92/100 on csv-to-md due to a test bug: `expect(md).toContain('price') || expect(md).toContain('Price')` effectively requires BOTH 'price' AND 'Price' (since expect returns undefined on success, which is falsy, causing || to always evaluate the right side). The model uses lowercase CSV headers (containing 'price') but never includes 'Price' with capital P. The model does not load the skill despite various description strategies — it handles tasks directly without guidance. html-to-md consistently scores 100/100.
